name: Test Loop: First Real Ralph Run
description: Minimal end-to-end test of the Ralph autonomous loop. Exercises all 7 R&D cycle tasks with safe, non-destructive operations. Goal: verify sampling works through Claude Code MCP session, cost tracking records usage, and progress persists to disk.
completion: All 7 tasks complete: scan found no critical issues, plan confirmed roadmap is current, CHANGELOG.md created, make check passes, notes recorded, report generated, next cycle scheduled.

tasks.description: Run rdcycle_scan to check for MCP ecosystem changes. This is a read-only operation that queries GitHub for recent activity.
Run rdcycle_plan with the scan results. Analyze the roadmap at $HOME/hairglasses-studio/claudekit/roadmap.json. If no urgent work items found, note that all tiers are complete.
Create a CHANGELOG.md file at $HOME/hairglasses-studio/claudekit/CHANGELOG.md summarizing the 7 completed tiers and 34 MCP tools. Use rdcycle_artifacts to record what was created.
Run rdcycle_verify with command 'make check' to verify the build still passes after changes.
Run rdcycle_notes to record improvement notes for this test cycle: what worked (sampling through MCP session), what to improve (iteration count, token usage), and suggestions for next cycle.
Run rdcycle_report to generate a research report summarizing this test loop's findings.
Run rdcycle_schedule to write the next cycle's spec file based on findings from this loop.
